_comment_1: Example TDD enforcement config for a spoke repo. Copy to .claude/tdd-config.json in the target repo and adjust paths.
_comment_2: Drives scripts/tdd_hook.py in the hub. Missing config in a repo = hooks no-op for that repo (opt-in).
_field_tdd_default_paths: Path prefixes that participate in TDD enforcement. Only impl files inside these prefixes trigger the PostToolUse runner and the PreToolUse commit gate.
_field_tdd_skip_paths: Path prefixes that opt OUT of enforcement even when nested inside a default path. Use for site assets, generated code, one-shot scripts, docs.
_field_test_mapping: Ordered list of impl→test rules. `impl` is a Python regex; `test` is a re.sub template. First match wins.
_escape_hatch: To bypass the commit gate on a single commit, include `tdd-skip: <reason>` anywhere in the commit body. The literal string is what the hook scans for.
